title: BlueFrame Digital
summary: Building modern web applications with SvelteKit and TypeScript, with a strong focus on performance, accessibility, and user experience.

title: DotControl | Digital Engagement Agency
summary: Worked as a Front-end Developer, setting up modern build tooling, improving web performance and accessibility, and translating high-fidelity designs into production-ready code. Contributed to projects for clients including National Geographic, DPG Media, and SourceUp.

title: First Freelance Projects
summary: Built and launched websites for Solar Gard Curaçao and Vertisol Curaçao—two client projects that remain live today.

title: Discovered JavaScript
summary: Started with HTML and CSS before discovering JavaScript, which sparked my passion for web development.

title: A Little Bit of Everything
summary: Worked in marketing agencies, hospitality, and restaurant management while studying at university and exploring a career in construction. These experiences shaped my communication, teamwork, and problem-solving skills long before I became a developer.
